_comment_meta: Notes here ship with the app and are shown to every user. Keys are the exact release name as shown next to the tag icon in the game details dialog. Values are the note text. Keys starting with an underscore are ignored, so use them for breadcrumbs like this one. See _example below for the run: syntax.
_example:
Plain text just renders as text.

Bare URLs auto-linkify and open in your browser: https://example.com

Lines starting with 'run:' become buttons. Confirm prompt before anything fires.

run: Clear app data | pm clear com.example.package
run: List installed | pm list packages | grep example

If a step starts with 'adb ' it runs the bundled adb binary directly (we auto-inject -s <serial>). Steps without that prefix run as 'adb shell <step>'.

run: Reinstall + push obb | adb install -g /path/to/app.apk & adb push /path/to/obbfolder /sdcard/Android/obb/com.example.package/

Label before | is optional. Without one the button shows the raw command:

run: settings put global development_settings_enabled 1
